name: Raw Soaps and Suds — Handmade Soap Scents
description: Five handmade essential-oil bar soaps on a shared coconut oil and shea butter base. $4 per bar, or 3 for $10. Local pickup only in Johnson County, Texas.

item.name: Mango Madness Soap Bar
item.description: Bright and juicy, like ripe mango in the height of summer. Handmade on a coconut oil and shea butter base, scented with essential oils. $4 per bar, or 3 for $10.

offers.description: Order by email or phone for local pickup in Johnson County, Texas — no online checkout.
